gate_note: Synthetic simulation shows pipeline within gate bounds. Real device validation is required for hard gate confirmation before Week 3 handoff.
methodology: Error simulation based on published iPhone LiDAR accuracy specs (±2-3mm at 1.5m) plus typical Open3D circumference fitting systematic bias. Bias: -2mm underestimation from partial occlusion on back surface. Noise: ±1.5mm from depth sensor jitter.
